meta.note: Seed list. Edit this file to add tools, models or topics policy teams want to track.

items.name: Grok
items.reason: Track public reporting and evidence relating to Grok capability, safeguards, misuse and policy relevance.

items.name: Open-source / open-weight models
items.reason: Track evidence about proliferation, offline use, fine-tuning, safeguards and supply-chain risks.

items.name: AI agents
items.reason: Track evidence that agentic systems may change offender workflows, automation and operational response needs.

items.name: Deepfake tools
items.reason: Track synthetic media misuse and detection/mitigation evidence.
